_meta.description: Known wallet addresses used across all Alliance DAO tooling. Catalog only includes COLLECTIVE / PUBLIC entities (treasuries, multi-sigs, protocol-owned wallets, named bribers). Individual member personal addresses are NOT included — members can paste their own address when needed.

schema.label: display name
schema.subtype: one of wallets subtypes from categories.json
